MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William Lynn, Esq. 650-813-9700 of Royse Law Firm for Moving party.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

ROYSE LAW FIRM, ATTY. LISA CHAPMAN, ATTY. WILLIAM LYNN'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL.

Granted. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

PLAINTIFF LOUIS KIRBY'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Under Ccp 664.6 And Request For Attorneys Fees.
